name: StormForge
description: StormForge — Kubernetes resource optimization platform using ML to right-size CPU and memory requests and limits.

seo.title: StormForge — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: StormForge: StormForge — Kubernetes resource optimization platform using ML to right-size CPU and memory requests and limits.

when_to_use: ML-based Kubernetes CPU and memory right-sizing
Automated resource request/limit optimization for pods
Load test integration to recommend production-ready limits
Cost reduction without manual HPA and VPA tuning

pros: Integrates with existing HPA and VPA
cons: Not a testing tool despite category listing
Requires meaningful Kubernetes scale to justify
review.verdict: A solid Kubernetes right-sizing tool, though its placement in test automation catalogs is a misnomer.
review.best_for: Mid-to-large Kubernetes clusters with enough scale to justify optimization SaaS
review.not_for: Small clusters or teams looking for actual test automation tooling
